description: Launcher-side package for detecting whether fallback profile identity/name inputs should trigger a name-locked celebrity/special portrait package before the full client asset catalog is mounted.

source_policy.required_existing_source_hint: approved celebrity/name-lock definitions in main client

notes: Approved name-lock definitions should be migrated from the main client once the exact source path is located.
This package exists so the launcher owns the detection boundary and the client receives an explicit launch context rather than independently guessing wrapper/profile identity.
Do not invent replacement celebrity mappings during launcher migration. Only migrate approved existing mappings.
